name: io.github.AtlasDevHQ/atlas
title: Atlas
description: Atlas is a YAML-defined semantic layer for analytics — authored by humans, consumed by AI agents. The MCP server exposes validated SELECT-only SQL execution and typed semantic-layer accessors (listEntities, describeEntity, searchGlossary, runMetric) over your warehouse, plus query-pattern prompts and read-only resources for entities, glossary, and metrics.

environmentVariables.name: ATLAS_DATASOURCE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Connection URL for your analytics datasource (PostgreSQL, MySQL, ClickHouse, Snowflake, DuckDB, BigQuery, Salesforce). Optional — when unset, the installer points at a bundled NovaMart demo SQLite fixture so the install works zero-config.

environmentVariables.name: ATLAS_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: LLM provider (anthropic, openai, bedrock, ollama, vercel-ai-gateway). Optional — the MCP server itself does not call an LLM (the client does), so this only matters if you also run Atlas's chat or scheduler surfaces.

environmentVariables.name: ATLAS_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of a running Atlas API. Optional — defaults to http://localhost:3001. When set, the MCP server inherits the API's connections, semantic layer, and governance.
